calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jan-14-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:34am and concluding at 9:47am.

Plaintiff WAYMO LLC appearing represented by David Killoran, Esq. vis zoom.
Defendant Ronaile Burton not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines Plaintiff BRANDON ODIAH Market Opperations Lead and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff WAYMO LLC, and against Defendant Ronaile Burton, as follows:

Damages: $21,898.76

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $21,898.76

Plaintiff's request for an injunction restraining Defendant from WAYMO vehicles. He must staty 50 feet from all all WAYMO vehicles and must not impead their movements. The injunction is in effect for three years.

Mr. Killoran may prepare a judgment and sumit to the court via email.

Off Calendar Jul-17-2025 Continued To Nov-18-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION
Off Calendar Oct-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. DAVID S. KILLORAN, Esq. of Dykema Gossett LLP (Tel: 669-231-8810) for Plaintiff Waymo LLC;
No other appearances made in this matter.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear.

Matter argued and submitted.

The Court rules as follows: Plaintiff's request for preliminary injunction is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
